title: ESL - 211info
text: CENTRO CULTURAL OF WASHINGTON COUNTY ESL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Hosts Goodwill Industries English as a Second Language (ESL) classes. 1110 N Adair Street Cornelius, OR 97113 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Administration: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-1pm and 2pm-6pm, Friday 8:30am-12:30pm Classes: Wednesday-Thursday 11am-1pm Email (503) 359-0446 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 359-0446 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Registration available year around FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Washington County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-1pm and 2pm-6pm, Friday 8:30am-12:30pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus line 57 to Forest Grove Services: English as a Second Language * Hispanic/Latino Community Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - ARTS AND CULTURE INFORMATION SERVICES - INFORMATION AND REFERRAL SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - YOUTH PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
